Records.description: Six-loop equal-mass banana integral in D=2-2eps dimensions. Related to a Calabi-Yau 5-fold. First case with two non-trivial Y-invariants Y_2 and Y_3. Seven master integrals M_0,...,M_6. The eps-expansion of M_1 starts at order eps^6: M_1^{(6,6)} involves iterated integrals over Y_2 and Y_3, with leading terms 1120*zeta_3^2 - 2016*zeta_5*ln(q). Singular points at x in {4,16,36,64} (i.e. (2k)^2 for k=1,...,4, but from paper: S^{(6)} = {1,9,49} for l=6 even). The special local normal form is theta_q^2 (1/Y_2) theta_q (1/Y_3) theta_q (1/Y_2) theta_q^2. Compared against pySecDec with excellent agreement.
